trigger: Start actual-use outcome logging for repo-local skills without synthetic evidence.

verification: logs/skill_outcomes.jsonl is the actual-use evidence surface
decisions: Do not broaden .gitignore; force-add only logs/skill_outcomes.jsonl as the tracked operational evidence file.

trigger: Make the smallest reversible change needed to begin actual-use skill outcome logging.

verification: working tree baseline was clean before the log change
changed surface is limited to the actual-use outcome log
decisions: No Plugin creation, Automation creation, or prefix rename was performed.

trigger: Verify that the new actual-use log is parsed and changes operational_maturity from no_data.

verification: policy test covers missing logs, real logs, not_applicable dimensions, and synthetic row rejection
audit consumes logs/skill_outcomes.jsonl and reports operational_maturity
repo-local skills article_alignment remains separate from operational_maturity
decisions: Verification is recorded as actual-use evidence, not as article_alignment proof.

trigger: User wanted correction feedback routing made stronger so pointed-out misses actively enter the self-improvement loop.

verification: feedback recurrence flow now has activationPolicy mode default_on_for_user_corrections
feedback-to-recurrence-patch now documents activation priority and skip reasons
skill promotion remains gated by replay or inverse-case evidence
decisions: Strengthen the correction entry bias without enabling automatic skill-to-skill invocation.
userFeedback: これを少し強くしたいですね。

trigger: Govern a routing-strength change without prematurely promoting a single correction into durable skill promotion.

verification: direct feedback-to-recurrence-patch to skill-promotion-governance remains forbidden
activation is default-on for user corrections but parent selection remains required
decisions: Treat this as routing hardening and actual-use evidence, not a promotion claim.
userFeedback: 指摘されたら積極的に回すようにしてほしい

trigger: Apply the smallest reversible config, docs, skill, test, and evidence-log changes needed to strengthen correction routing.

verification: changed surface is limited to routing contract, skill metadata, governance docs, validation test, and actual-use evidence log
decisions: Do not flip autoInvokeNext to true; strengthen the entry policy instead.

trigger: Verify the strengthened correction-routing contract and the actual-use evidence log.

decisions: Report remaining risk that parent agents must honor the default-on policy; this is not runtime auto-invocation.

trigger: User requested a repo-local skill for creating prompts from OpenAI GPT-5.5 prompt guidance.

verification: new skill package was created under .agents/skills
catalog and flow role were synchronized
decisions: Use a lean SKILL.md only; no bundled reference file was needed because the official URL is the source boundary.
userFeedback: プロンプト創るように依頼されたらgpt5.5のプロンプトガイドベースで作成するスキルを作成してください。

trigger: Evaluate the new GPT-5.5 prompt builder skill before relying on it.

decisions: Treat 100 as article-alignment evidence, not operational maturity proof.

trigger: Govern adding a new repo-local prompt-authoring skill without claiming promotion from one task.

decisions: Catalog the skill as adoptable package structure while leaving promotion dependent on future prompt-authoring outcomes.

trigger: Apply the smallest reversible skill package, catalog, flow, and evidence-log changes.

verification: changed surface is limited to new skill package, catalog, flow contract, and actual-use evidence log
decisions: Do not alter broad runtime behavior or auto-invocation rules for prompt creation.

trigger: Verify the new GPT-5.5 prompt builder skill package and synchronized repo-local contracts.

decisions: Report source limitation separately: OpenAI Docs MCP returned only the title, while the official web page body was checked through the browser/web source.
